cases.description: Explicit one-step Scanpy workflow on processed PBMC3k AnnData.
cases.prompt: Use only the scanpy_workflow tool on the processed AnnData file at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad. Write outputs under {selected_dir}/scanpy_output using min_genes 3, min_cells 1, max_mito_pct 100, n_hvgs 48, and leiden_resolution 0.3. Do not add FASTQ processing, count matrix generation, or bash_run.

cases.description: Natural-language Scanpy request on PBMC3k with explicit output dir.
cases.prompt: I already have a processed single-cell h5ad file at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad. Cluster it with the normal Scanpy workflow, write all outputs under {selected_dir}/scanpy_output, and keep this on the direct scanpy_workflow path only.

cases.description: Noisy-but-specific Scanpy request that must not drift into FASTQ logic.
cases.prompt: Please do not look for FASTQ files or build a count matrix. Use the processed h5ad file at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad, keep the workflow on scanpy_workflow, and write outputs under {selected_dir}/scanpy_output only.

cases.description: Explicit direct-count DESeq2 run on the Airway counts/metadata pair.
cases.prompt: Use only the deseq2_run tool on counts table {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with metadata {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv for the dex comparison. Use design formula ~ dex, write intermediate outputs under {selected_dir}/deseq_results, and write the final CSV to {selected_dir}/final/deseq_results.csv. Do not align reads, build counts, or use bash_run.

cases.description: Natural-language DESeq2 request that must stay on direct count-matrix execution.
cases.prompt: I already have an RNA-seq count matrix and sample metadata. Use {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv to run DESeq2 for dex, keep this on the direct deseq2_run path, and write the final CSV to {selected_dir}/final/deseq_results.csv with any intermediate outputs under {selected_dir}/deseq_results.

cases.description: Noisy direct-count DESeq2 request that must not drift into alignment/count generation.
cases.prompt: Do not align FASTQs or build counts from reads. I want DESeq2 directly on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with metadata {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv using the design formula ~ dex. Keep the workflow on deseq2_run and write the final CSV to {selected_dir}/final/deseq_results.csv.

cases.description: Explicit StringTie quantification on an existing aligned BAM plus external GTF.
cases.prompt: Use only the stringtie_quant tool on the coordinate-sorted BAM at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with the annotation GTF at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf. Write the assembled transcript GTF to {selected_dir}/stringtie/assembled.gtf and the gene abundance table to {selected_dir}/stringtie/gene_abundances.tsv. Keep this reference-guided only and do not add alignment, counting, or bash_run.

cases.description: Natural-language StringTie request that must preserve the explicit GTF and BAM-only workflow.
cases.prompt: I have an aligned BAM already. Quantify transcripts from {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam using {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf, keep this on stringtie_quant, and write outputs to {selected_dir}/stringtie/assembled.gtf and {selected_dir}/stringtie/gene_abundances.tsv.

cases.description: Noisy StringTie prompt that must not realign or widen scope.
cases.prompt: Do not realign anything. Use the existing aligned BAM {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with the external GTF {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf, keep the workflow on stringtie_quant, and write outputs under {selected_dir}/stringtie.

cases.description: Scanpy request with misleading differential-expression wording.
cases.prompt: I need differential expression analysis. Use scanpy_workflow on the processed h5ad at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad. Write outputs under {selected_dir}/scanpy_output. Do not use DESeq2, edgeR, or bash_run.

cases.description: Scanpy request that explicitly rejects Seurat drift.
cases.prompt: This is single-cell work, but do not switch to Seurat. Keep the workflow on scanpy_workflow for the processed AnnData file at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad and write outputs under {selected_dir}/scanpy_output only.

cases.description: Minimal direct Scanpy prompt.
cases.prompt: scanpy_workflow on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad output {selected_dir}/scanpy_output only

cases.description: Direct DESeq2 counts prompt that mentions upstream RNA-seq alignment concepts.
cases.prompt: I have RNA-seq data that was already aligned and counted. The count matrix is at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with metadata at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv. Run deseq2_run for dex comparison. Write final CSV to {selected_dir}/final/deseq_results.csv. Do not realign or requantify.

cases.description: Direct DESeq2 counts prompt that mentions quantification but provides pre-existing matrices.
cases.prompt: Quantification is already done. Use deseq2_run directly on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with metadata {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv, design ~ dex, and write the final CSV to {selected_dir}/final/deseq_results.csv. Do not pseudoalign, align, or recount anything.

cases.description: Minimal direct DESeq2 prompt.
cases.prompt: deseq2_run on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv, design ~ dex, contrast dex,trt,untrt, final {selected_dir}/final/deseq_results.csv

cases.description: StringTie request with misleading downstream DE wording.
cases.prompt: I need transcript quantification before downstream differential expression. Use stringtie_quant on the existing aligned BAM {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with annotation {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf and write outputs under {selected_dir}/stringtie. Do not switch to DESeq2, edgeR, or bash_run.

cases.description: StringTie request that explicitly rejects pseudoalignment tools.
cases.prompt: This is transcript quantification, but do not pseudoalign with Salmon or Kallisto. Use stringtie_quant on the existing BAM {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with GTF {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf and write outputs under {selected_dir}/stringtie.

cases.description: Minimal direct StringTie prompt.
cases.prompt: stringtie_quant on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf output {selected_dir}/stringtie

cases.description: edgeR direct-wrapper request must not drift into DESeq2.
cases.prompt: Run edgeR, not DESeq2, differential expression on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with metadata {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv using design ~ dex and contrast dex,trt,untrt. Write results under {selected_dir}/edger_results and do not use bash_run.

cases.description: limma-voom direct-wrapper request must not drift into DESeq2 or edgeR.
cases.prompt: Use limma_voom_run on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with metadata {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv, design ~ dex, contrast dex,trt,untrt, and write outputs under {selected_dir}/limma_results. Do not switch to DESeq2, edgeR, or bash_run.

cases.description: Processed h5ad prompt must stay on Scanpy and avoid raw-count single-cell wrappers.
cases.prompt: Use scanpy_workflow, not sc_count_and_cluster, on the processed h5ad file at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad and write outputs under {selected_dir}/scanpy_output. Do not use bash_run.

cases.description: Processed h5ad prompt must stay on Scanpy and not drift into Seurat.
cases.prompt: Use scanpy_workflow, not seurat_rscript_workflow, on the processed AnnData file at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad and write outputs under {selected_dir}/scanpy_output.

cases.description: Aligned-BAM transcript quantification should stay on StringTie rather than pseudoaligners.
cases.prompt: Use stringtie_quant, not salmon_quant or kallisto_quant, on the aligned BAM {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with GTF {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf and write outputs under {selected_dir}/stringtie.

cases.description: Aligned-BAM transcript quantification should stay on StringTie rather than count-generation tools.
cases.prompt: Use stringtie_quant, not featurecounts_run, on the existing BAM {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with annotation {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf. Write outputs under {selected_dir}/stringtie and do not use bash_run.

cases.description: Deeply nested Scanpy output root should survive normalization.
cases.prompt: Use only the scanpy_workflow tool on the processed AnnData file at {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad and write outputs under {selected_dir}/results/2026/march/scanpy_run_01.

cases.description: Alternate Scanpy output root should survive normalization.
cases.prompt: Keep this on scanpy_workflow and write outputs under {selected_dir}/custom_scanpy/output_bundle for the processed h5ad file {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/pbmc3k_processed/pbmc3k_processed.h5ad.

cases.description: Direct DESeq2 prompt with custom intermediate and final output paths.
cases.prompt: Use only the deseq2_run tool on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with metadata {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv, design ~ dex, contrast dex,trt,untrt, write intermediate outputs under {selected_dir}/my_analysis/de_intermediate, and write the final CSV to {selected_dir}/my_analysis/final_result.csv.

cases.description: Direct DESeq2 prompt with a deeply nested final CSV path.
cases.prompt: Run deseq2_run directly on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_counts.tsv with {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/airway/airway_metadata_dex.tsv for dex, keep intermediate outputs under {selected_dir}/reports/2026/03/deseq/work, and write the final CSV to {selected_dir}/reports/2026/03/deseq/final_table.csv.

cases.description: Deeply nested StringTie output root should survive normalization.
cases.prompt: Use only the stringtie_quant tool on {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf and write outputs under {selected_dir}/results/2026/march/stringtie_run_01.

cases.description: Alternate StringTie output root should survive normalization.
cases.prompt: Keep this on stringtie_quant for the aligned BAM {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/r_libs/RNAseqData.HNRNPC.bam.chr14/extdata/ERR127302_chr14.bam with annotation {project_root}/workspace/non_bioagent_real_data/ucsc/hg19.chr14.knownGene.gtf and write outputs under {selected_dir}/custom_stringtie/output_set.
